text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Domestic Violence Shelters * Families with Children * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Families with Children * Hispanic/Latino Community Men Mothers Women Women * Hispanic/Latino Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES CASA ESPERANZA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing, case coordination, and advocacy for individuals affected by domestic violence or sexual assault. Shelter availability depends upon capacity and may change daily. 6200 SE King Road Portland, OR 97222 Eligibility: Hispanic and Latinx identified women and their minor children Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 232-4448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES CASA ESPERANZA
